stem: In the xy-plane, line s passes through the point (0, 0) and is parallel to the line represented by the equation y = 11x - 3. If line s also passes through the point (5, d), what is the value of d?
rationale: Parallel lines have the same slope; here the slope is 11. Line s passes through the origin, so y = 11x. At x = 5: d = 11(5) = 55. Choice A is correct.
